call_transcript: Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently inquired about a personal loan on our website. Um, how are you doing today? Customer: Good, thanks. Agent: Great! So, we're pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%.  Is that something you'd be interested in exploring? Customer: Well, I'm thinking about consolidating some debt. Agent: Excellent! That's a very common use for our loans.  We can definitely help with that. What kind of debt are we looking at? Customer: Credit card debt, mostly. About 8 grand. Agent: Okay, perfect.  So, with the $10,000 Personal Loan at 8.99%, you could pay off that credit card debt and have some extra for, you know, emergencies. The monthly payments would be around $198.  Does that sound manageable? Customer: Hmm, $198... yeah, that's doable. What are the terms? Agent: It's a 60-month term.  And there are no prepayment penalties.  We can get the paperwork started today if you'd like. Customer: Okay, let's do it.

Agent: Hello Mr. Miller? This is Sarah with Financial Solutions. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. Customer: Where did you get my number? I didn't give anyone permission to call me. Agent: Sir, we… uh… it's a marketing list. We're pre-approving you for a $2500 Signature Credit Card at 19.99%. Customer: 19.99?! Are you kidding me? That's outrageous! I already have a credit card. Agent: Well, this card offers rewards points and… Customer: No, thank you. I'm not interested. And please take my number off your list.  I'm really not happy about this call. Agent: Okay, sir. I understand. Have a good day. *click*

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Finance Solutions. I understand you were referred to us by GreenTech Financial.  How are you today? Customer: Yeah, hi. I spoke with someone there. Agent: Great! So, we're looking at pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 7.49%.  What are you hoping to use the funds for? Customer: I'm planning a home renovation. Kitchen mostly. Agent: Fantastic! A kitchen renovation is a great investment.  With the $15,000 Personal Loan at 7.49%, your monthly payments would be approximately $290.  We have a few different term options available. Customer: Okay. What are the fees? Agent: There's an origination fee of 1.5% of the loan amount, so that would be $225.  There are no annual fees or prepayment penalties.  We also have a late payment fee of $25. Customer: Hmm, okay.  The origination fee is a little annoying, but… it's not terrible.  Can you send me some more details about the terms?

Agent: Hello Mr. Brown? This is Lisa from Finance Solutions. We're offering a… Customer: (Interrupting) Look, you guys called me yesterday! I told you I'm not interested!  Where did you even get my number? This is ridiculous! Agent: Sir, I apologize for the inconvenience. We're just… offering a pre-approved Signature Credit Card with a $5000 limit at 17.99%. Customer: I don't want a credit card! I've told you!  Take me off your list!  This is harassment! *click*

Agent: Hello Mrs. Davis? This is Mark from Finance Solutions. I see you inquired about a personal loan on our website.  How are you doing today? Customer: Oh, hello. I'm alright, dear.  Could you speak up a little?  I'm a bit hard of hearing. Agent: Certainly.  We're pre-approving you for an $8,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 12.99%.  What were you hoping to use the loan for? Customer: Well, my grandson needs help with college tuition.  It's very expensive these days. Agent: That's wonderful of you to help him.  With the $8,000 Personal Loan at 12.99%, your monthly payments would be around $175.  We have flexible repayment options. Customer: Hmm, that sounds… a little high. I'm on a fixed income, you see.  I'm not sure I can afford that right now. Agent: I understand. We can explore other options, perhaps a smaller loan amount or a longer repayment term.  But for now, it sounds like it might not be the right fit.  Thank you for your time.

Agent: Hi David, this is Sarah calling from Finance Solutions. I understand you were referred to us by Tech Solutions.  How are you doing? Customer: Good, good.  Look, I'm kinda busy, can we make this quick? Agent: Absolutely. We're pre-approving you for a $7500 Signature Credit Card at 14.99%. What are you hoping to use the card for? Customer: Travel, mostly. I'm planning a trip to Europe. Agent: Excellent! Our card offers travel rewards and no foreign transaction fees.  The credit limit is $7500 at 14.99%.  We can also offer a balance transfer option if you have existing debt. Customer: Hmm, okay. What's the APR? Agent: It's 14.99% APR.  And we have a promotional 0% introductory rate for the first six months. Customer: Six months, huh?  That's good.  Is there an annual fee? Agent: There is a $99 annual fee.  But the rewards you'll earn will more than offset that. Customer: Okay, alright.  I think I'm in. Let's do it.

Agent: Hello Ms. Rodriguez? This is David from Finance Solutions. We're offering a pre-approved Personal Loan. Customer: (Skeptical) How did you get my number? I never signed up for anything. Agent: Ma'am, it's a marketing list. We're pre-approving you for a $6000 Personal Loan at 15.49%. Customer: I'm not interested. I don't need a loan. Agent: Well, it could be useful for consolidating debt or… Customer: I said no! I don't want a loan!  I'm perfectly fine, thank you.  Don't call me again. Agent: Okay, ma'am. I understand. Have a good evening.

Agent: Hello Mr. Thompson? This is Lisa from Finance Solutions. I see you're an existing customer.  How are you doing today? Customer: Oh, hello dear.  You called yesterday, didn't you?  I'm a little confused. Agent: Yes, sir. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. We're pre-approving you for a $3000 Signature Credit Card at 18.99%. Customer: 18.99?  That sounds… high.  What does that even mean? Agent: It's the annual percentage rate, sir.  The interest you'll pay on any balance you carry. Customer: Oh.  Well, I don't really understand all that.  I just want something simple. Agent: I understand. It can be a bit confusing. Perhaps this isn't the right card for you at this time.  Thank you for your time, sir.

Agent: Hi Ashley, this is David from Finance Solutions. I understand you were referred to us by University Credit Union. How are you doing? Customer: Hey, yeah, I spoke with someone there. I'm good, kinda busy though. Agent: No problem, I'll be quick. We're pre-approving you for a $12,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 9.49%. What are you planning to use the funds for? Customer: I'm trying to pay off some student loans. They're killing me. Agent: Excellent! That's a smart move. With the $12,000 Personal Loan at 9.49%, your monthly payments would be around $230. We can also explore different repayment terms. Customer: Okay, that sounds pretty good. What's the catch? Agent: No catch! There's a small origination fee of 1% – that's $120 – and no prepayment penalties. Customer: Hmm, okay. And what about the APR? Agent: The APR is 9.49%. We can send you a full breakdown of the terms and conditions. Customer: Yeah, that would be great. Let's go ahead and get the ball rolling. I'm ready to apply.

Agent: Hello Mr. Lee? This is Sarah from Finance Solutions. We're offering a… Customer: (Interrupting, with a heavy sigh) Seriously? You people again? I've told you three times now, I am not interested! I'm going to report you to the authorities if you keep calling me! Where did you even get my number?! Agent: Sir, I apologize for the inconvenience. We… Customer: Just take me off your list! Now! *click*
